text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello successfully lobbies the<n>academy to
gather the student body<n>for an information
session.

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student A
text_block_list.text: ...An info session for the Grand<n>Concert?

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student B
Assembled Student C
text_block_list.text:
Didn't it blow up in some<n>controversy, though?
Besides, a<n>concert just sounds like a lot of work.

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student D
text_block_list.text:
Why do we need another concert<n>anyway? We
already have winning<n>concerts.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In favor, against... uninterested.<n>Opinions are
varied.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We have to share how we feel about<n>it first.
Then... well, they can form their<n>own opinions.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Why must obtaining consentbe so bothersome?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And the real bother is that this<n>experiment simply
cannot happen<n>without it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
For we have a hypothesis to test:<n>can the
"potential" of concerts induce<n>growth in other
Umamusume as well?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, Tachyon... Remember what you<n>said when
you invited me to join this<n>project?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You said you knew what I'd learn<n>from this
experience. And that's why<n>you wanted to help.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yes, what of it?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Does that mean you also—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Shh, it's about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Hello, everyone. My name is Light<n>Hello.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
This may seem out of the blue, but<n>what do we all
think about winning<n>concerts?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
My grandmother always told me that<n>they're a
chance to give thanks, so I<n>should sing with
gratitude for all the<n>people who support my
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
But some runners never get to sing. I<n>was one of
them.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
And so, I envisioned a stage where<n>everybody,
even girls like me, would<n>get an equal opportunity
to convey<n>their gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I thought that if there was no winning<n>or losing,
everyone could sing with a<n>smile on their face.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...But I was wrong. I forgot something<n>important
about us.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Winning concerts are special to us<n>Umamusume.
They are the stages of<n>our dreams, and always
should be.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: But still, I... I wanted to see her shine!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I saw how hard she danced in the<n>spotlight's
shadow. I saw her crying<n>all alone when she
failed to place.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I saw her step down from the stage<n>without once
standing at its center...<n>But I wanted to see her
sing! I<n>wanted to scream at the top of my<n>lungs
for her!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Because I was her fan...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I know this is a selfish request, but I<n>make it not
as one of you, but as a<n>fan!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I want you all to do this concert! I<n>want to create a
space where we can<n>convey all of our feelings to
each<n>other freely!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Because to us, each and every one of<n>you is a
star.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
In our eyes, there are no backup<n>dancers; there
are only lead<n>performers, each deserving of her
own spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I want to see all of you shining on<n>stage at the
Grand Concert as the<n>stars of the show!

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student B
text_block_list.text: I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student B
text_block_list.text:
She says it's for the fans, but then<n>what's the
point of winning concerts?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh dear...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If I could have your attention...<n>Winning concerts
are, indeed, the<n>proper venue for conveying
gratitude<n>to our fans.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Tachyon?! What are you—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But is gratitude all you wish to convey<n>in a
concert?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hello has spoken! The fans have<n>spoken!
"Congratulations"? "You ran<n>well"? They have
more to say than<n>this...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
"I want you center stage." "You'll<n>always be my
number one." "I never<n>want to stop watching over
you."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
"You are the one and only star in my<n>eyes." These
are the self-absorbed<n>sentiments they wish to
convey!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And what about you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Do your egos not desire to convey<n>anything other
than a trite "Thank you<n>for helping me win"?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I want to tell my fans that I've come<n>home to
them, and thank them for<n>waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I see... Anyone else?

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student A
text_block_list.text: ...I want them to look at me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Your voice is so quiet all of a<n>sudden. Perhaps
you don't feel so<n>strongly about the matter?

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student A
text_block_list.text:
I want them to look at me! I want to<n>scream, "Look
at me! Follow me!<n>Cheer only for me!"

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student B
text_block_list.text: Hey, what are you—

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student C
text_block_list.text:
And I want to tell them that I'm not<n>done yet! That
no matter how many<n>times I lose, I have a goal,
and I<n>won't give up on it no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student C
text_block_list.text:
So until then, no matter what happens,<n>stay with
me—run with me! That's<n>what I want to say!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh heh... Yes, there's that passion.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Do you see now? The Grand Concert<n>is of an
altogether different nature<n>than winning concerts!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The Grand Concert is not so noble.<n>Rather, it is an
arena where egos<n>clash—yours and your fans'!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It is no place for such niceties as<n>"thank you" or
"congratulations," but<n>a crucible of desires. "I want
to win."<n>"You better win." "Watch me." "Don't
stop."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...A crucible of dreams, if you will.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A space for all Umamusume and their<n>fans to
confess their dreams, nurture<n>them, and bring to
life the possibilities<n>therein.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Need I remind you? The resonance<n>observed
between a racer and her<n>fans generates energy
capable of<n>opening the most impossible and
reckless of doors.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now what if the Grand Concert could<n>strengthen
and deepen that<n>resonance?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What if it could generate such an<n>explosion of
passion as to transform<n>your current
limits—indeed, transform<n>everything?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh... Irresistible, is it not? Best<n>make full use
of it, I say!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Use it not for your fans, but for<n>yourself—for the
sake of broadening<n>your own potential!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: That passion will serve you well.

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student B
text_block_list.text:
...Will it really make us stronger? Can<n>we really
join the concert just for<n>that?

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student D
text_block_list.text: Um... do you think I could transform<n>myself too?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well. Who knew you were<n>all so
selfish? Whether you have a<n>message to convey
or simply want to<n>get better, your reasons for
performing matter not.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I might add that we already have data<n>gathered
from yours truly. Performing<n>has been observed to
have a positive<n>effect on times.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, and not only that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I myself have observed a marked<n>change in at
least one subject.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Change can come to me... or any of<n>us.

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student A
text_block_list.text: I kinda want to give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student C
text_block_list.text: ...Me too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What starts as a few murmurs here<n>and there
gradually grows into a<n>wave that sweeps across
the room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello's plea seems to have<n>resonated with
the students.
